items.briefing:
Australian organisations should be aware that the Asia Pacific region is now the top target for financially motivated cyberattacks, meaning local businesses face heightened risk. Separately, a new report shows attackers are increasingly exploiting software vulnerabilities rather than tricking people through phishing — so keeping systems and software updated is more important than ever. Australian farmers are also being urged to consider cyber insurance, with research showing only one in four are thinking about it despite growing risks to rural businesses.

**Practical tip:** Check that your organisation's software and operating systems are set to update automatically — patching known vulnerabilities remains one of the most effective defences against attack.

featured.title: ASD warns of device code phishing as Proofpoint tracks growing criminal toolkits
featured.quote: ASD warns Australian Microsoft 365 users of device code phishing threat with growing criminal toolkits.
